name: locket-dio
description: Locket Dio — private close-friends photo & video sharing

scripts.build: npm install --prefix apps/web && npm run build --prefix apps/web && node scripts/copy-web-dist.mjs
scripts.build:web: npm install --prefix apps/web && npm run build --prefix apps/web && node scripts/copy-web-dist.mjs
scripts.build:api: npm install --prefix apps/api && npm run build --prefix apps/api
